productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a rugged stitch finish for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearConcealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitSuede lining on the backfoot for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleLeather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with oval and round lugs strategically placed on the forefoot and midfoot, with a raised textured heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesCurved midfoot and raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
